entry.title: ERR! CRWEB00000119
entry.content:
Hi ,

 

Any reason why I'm getting the below error when trying to view a report in Crystal server 2020  (CMC & BI Launch pad) ?

Thanks

entry.title: How to Access SAP Credential Store Using Mutual TLS (mTLS) Authentication with Python
entry.content:
What Is SAP Credential Store? SAP Credential Store is a repository on SAP BTP (Business Technology Platform) where you can securely store credentials, passwords, keys, and other sensitive data. For enhanced security, you can configure it to use mTLS, which verifies both the client and server identities before granting access.


Setting Up the Credential Store in SAP BTP for mTLS

Go to your SAP BTP sub-account, then select Instances and Subscriptions to create a new Credential Store instance if you haven’t done so already.


Click Create. Default Authentication type for credential store is mTLS.
After creating the Credential Store instance, click View Dashboard to open the Credential Store console.

SAP Credential Store organizes data by namespaces for logical separation. Click Create Namespace and name it according to your application.

Choose the credential type as needed, such as password, key, keyring. For our example, we’ll use an password type.

For Deployment of Basic Python App in Cloud Foundry refer the blog, Integrating a Python App with SAP BAS 
 
Now, let’s bind the credential store to an application called summary


Navigate to the app -> Environment Variables

For mTLS, you’ll need:

  • A client certificate (issued by a trusted Certificate Authority)
  • A private key
  • A server certificate (provided by SAP Credential Store)

 

 

{
	"VCAP_SERVICES": {
		"credstore": [
			{
				"label": "credstore",
				"provider": null,
				"plan": "trial",
				"name": "trial-cred",
				"tags": [
					"credstore",
					"securestore",
					"keystore",
					"credentials"
				],
				"instance_guid": "0068a9eb-d4b5-4570-a7c8-fce5163eb95f",
				"instance_name": "trial-cred",
				"binding_guid": "60346d93-9d88-4a50-bfd4-59ae49df5b87",
				"binding_name": null,
				"credentials": {
					"expires_at": "2025-01-01T14:28:44.5Z",
					"encryption": {
						"client_private_key": "",
						"server_public_key": "",
					"parameters": {
						"authorization": {
							"default_permissions": [
								"create",
								"decrypt",
								"delete",
								"encrypt",
								"info",
								"list",
								"namespaces",
								"read",
								"update"
							]
						},
						"encryption": {
							"payload": "enabled",
							"key": {
								"size": 3072
							}
						},
						"authentication": {
							"type": "mtls"
						},
						"access_policy": {
							"creds_api": "public",
							"token_api": "public",
							"kms_api": "public",
							"encryption_api": "public"
						}
					},
					"url": "https://credstore.mesh.cf.us10.hana.ondemand.com/api/v1/credentials",
					"key": "",
					"username": "60346d93-9d88-4a50-bfd4-59ae49df5b87.0.PXDf09rhPs7MkShqWt2be9CdoGLG1VmaAKW4D3kzWPg="
				},
				"syslog_drain_url": null,
				"volume_mounts": []
			}
		]
	}
}

 

Python Code to Access the Credential Storage API

 

from dotenv import load_dotenv
import os
import json
import requests
from jwcrypto import jwk, jwe

namespace = "PasswordHub"
name = "Password"

cred_headers = {
    "sapcp-credstore-namespace": namespace
}
cred_params = {
    "name": name
}

load_dotenv()
vcap_services = os.getenv("VCAP_SERVICES")

if vcap_services:
    binding = json.loads(vcap_services)['credstore'][0]['credentials']
    rsa_private_key = f"{binding['key']}"
    primary_certificate = f"{binding['certificate']}"
    api_url = binding["url"]
else:
    raise ValueError("VCAP_SERVICES not found in environment.")

try:
    with open("rsa_key.pem", "w") as key_file:
        key_file.write(rsa_private_key)
    
    with open("client_cert.pem", "w") as cert_file:
        cert_file.write(primary_certificate)

    response = requests.get(
        url=f"{api_url}/password",
        cert=("client_cert.pem", "rsa_key.pem"),
        verify=True,
        headers=cred_headers,
        params=cred_params
    )
    private_key_pem =f"-----BEGIN PRIVATE KEY-----\n{binding['encryption']['client_private_key']}\n-----END PRIVATE KEY-----"
    private_key = jwk.JWK.from_pem(private_key_pem.encode('utf-8'))
    jwetoken = jwe.JWE()
    jwetoken.deserialize(response.text, key=private_key)
    resp = jwetoken.payload.decode('utf-8')
    json_payload = json.loads(resp)
    api_key_val = json_payload['value']

    print(f"Password stored in credential store for {cred_params['name']} is :-", api_key_val)
finally:
    os.remove("rsa_key.pem")
    os.remove("client_cert.pem")

 

Requirements:

 

python-dotenv
jwcrypto
requests

 

Reference Link:

SAP Credential Store 
Credential Management (Example: NodeJs)

entry.title: Re: NF-e Nota Técnica 2019.001 v1.62 novos campos adicionados à nota fiscal
entry.content: Fizemos todo o processo de implementação das notas aqui, porém, o quadro contendo os novos campos de crédito presumido não estão aparecendo na aba Impostos dos itens nas transações J1B*N, existe algum passo ou configuração para marcar o quadro como "visível"?

entry.title: Re: SAP GUI ALV width on 2K, 4K monitors
entry.content: Does the ALV appear to be "cut off" on the right side? If the ALV does have a scroll bar, does the scrollbar appear in the middle of the screen instead of the right side?

entry.title: Re: How can we leverage SAP C/4HANA to improve customer e...
entry.content:
Hello @tomnguyen1 ,

  • Based on my vast implementation experience, it's not easy to complete the implementation of SAP CX (a.k.a. SAP C/4HANA) applications in just 1/2 month without proper scoping, planning, etc.
  • I highly recommend you go through the SAP Free Learning Modules for SAP C/4HANA or SAP CX which will give you an idea of which SAP CX modules/applications will suit your business processes.

You can always get in touch with SAP or Partners for paid consulting.

I hope this answers your query.

Thanks and Regards,
Kunal Bansal
SAP CX Solution Architect
……………………………………………………….

entry.title: Notification whenever a new position is filled with a new employee/employee master data
entry.content:
Hi,

Is there any possibility to create a new notification whenever a new position is filled with a new employee/employee master data. Currently the payroll team informs the creator of the new position (recruiting) by e-mail after they have filled the position with a newly created employee (master data). Is there any possibility to use the completion of the new employee data as trigger for a notification to the creator of the position (recruiting)?

Thank you and regards,

Aneta Krysiak

SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central

entry.title: Re: Proposal to keep spammers away
entry.content:
Hi @DominikTylczyn - we certainly hope this was the last spam attack of this magnitude. 

Regarding your feedback above:
We already ban new users who publish this kind of spam content immediately.

Your proposal has been taken into consideration, and we are working closely together with our platform vendor to see what can be done. (FYI: all blog posts are already pre-moderated in the SAP community)

entry.title: Re: Purchase Order Process Control
entry.content:
Hi Raina 

AS it is SAP Cloud system. I think you need to search in SCCUI or in manage your solution. Please check that and select sourcing and procurement and find in purchasing.

 

Regards

Rashid Khan

entry.title: Re: Issue with CPI XI adapter data format !!
entry.content: Hi , I am also facing similar issue. Please suggest how to resolve it.

entry.title: Re: How can I see the previous (moved developments) devel...
entry.content: @yalcin_mete Yes there are no versions in your production system. NB: you didn't understand correctly VERS_AT_IMP; it's not considered when you modify an object (e.g. in DEV), it's only considered when you import (e.g. in PROD). The creation of a version is automatic when you change an object assigned to a transport request (e.g. DEV). Anyway, the versions in PROD correspond to the versions in DEV, so even without version in PROD, with the import history, you know exactly what happened.

entry.title: Resource Management Post 1KC Scope Item Deprecation
entry.content:
Hi Team,

We're currently using the Advanced Resource Management - Project-Based Services (1KC) scope item for resource management in our SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud Professional Services environment.

Problem:

With the upcoming 2502 system upgrade, the 1KC scope item will be deprecated.

Question:

Please provide guidance on the best approach to manage resource allocation and tracking after the 1KC scope item is no longer available.

if we don't upgrade on time what is the work around for allocation

Thank you for your assistance.

entry.title: Custom Chatbot Widget in SAPUI5 [ using Expression Binding ]
entry.content:
Hi all, 

This is a part of Chatbot Blog series and focuses on how to build Chat Assistant Widget in Fiori using Freestyle UI5.

The Chat Assistant in Industry is way more complex and has tons of features, I am trying to keep the focus of this blog on building basics features with minimal efforts. 

 

To Add a Chat Assistant Widget in your existing app, a placeholder is required.

there are many options to add widgets in Fiori portal or standalone UI5 apps.

For Fiori Portal, Adding a button in ShellBar with a popover would be a great option. The Popover contains Chat Assistant widget. Since ShellBar remains constant in the fiori Launchpad, it can be accessed by all fiori application.  ( I found a blog for this. check this link for more info. )

For standalone UI5 applications, there are two best ways to add Chat Widget either in the Side Panel or as a button in bottom right corner with a popover containing chat widget. This is widely adopted by all chatbot providers. 

 

I think, sap.f.SidePanel is one of the most suitable UI5 control for adding such widgets.

Widget on Side Panel

Lets see how sap.f.SidePanel works.

Side Panel has two aggregations called mainContent and sideContent. mainContent Aggregation contains actual page containing  Business Object while sideContent contains more details on selected property or object or utility/ support/ helper tools.

 

Copy below code and add original website content in mainContent aggregation.

 

<mvc:View controllerName="your-namespace.controller.View1"
	xmlns:mvc="sap.ui.core.mvc" displayBlock="true"
	xmlns:core="sap.ui.core"
	xmlns:f="sap.f"
	xmlns="sap.m" 
        class="viewPadding">

	<Page id="page">
	  <content>

	    <f:SidePanel id="id_sp" sidePanelResizable="true" 
                                          toggle="onToggle" 
                                          sidePanelPosition="Right" 
                                          sidePanelWidth="30rem">
	      <f:mainContent>					
                ... Add your main Content here...
	      </f:mainContent>
	      <f:items>

	        <f:SidePanelItem icon="sap-icon://wounds-doc"          
                                  text="ChatAssistant" class="spi">
		  <f:content>
		    <VBox width="100%">
		      <IllustratedMessage id="id_illuMsg" 
                                          title="Chat Assistant" 
                                          class="sapUiLargeMarginTop"
                                          description="Ask me anything" 
                                          illustrationType="tnt-FaceID"
                                          illustrationSize="Scene">
                        <additionalContent>
                          <Button text="Lets go" press="onPressHide"/
                        </additionalContent>
                      </IllustratedMessage>

                      <ScrollContainer id="id_SC" visible="false" 
                                       width="100%"
                                       height="500px" 
                                       vertical="true">
                        <List id="id_List" items="{path:'chatbot>/list'}"
                                          noDataText="No Chat history..">    
                          <items>
                            <FeedListItem text="{chatbot>text}" 
                                  icon="{= ${chatbot>type} === 'query' ?                                        
                                  'sap-icon://customer' : 'sap-icon://da-2' }">
                            </FeedListItem>                        
                          </items>
                        </List>
                      </ScrollContainer>
                      <VBox id="id_box" visible="false" width="100%">
                        <Input width="100%" 
                               placeholder="Type your query here.."
                               submit="onSubmitQuery"/>
                      </VBox>
                    </VBox>
                  </f:content>
                </f:SidePanelItem>
              </f:items>
            </f:SidePanel>
          </content>
        </Page>
</mvc:View>

 

 

 

Digression on Expression Binding : 

I have used basic expression binding using ternary operator for choosing which icon to show based on the value of property "type".

If it is Query asked by User, then display icon would be Customer

if not, that means it is a response from the bot, then icon would be da-2 ( symbol of SAP Joule )

 

<List id="id_List" items="{path:'chatbot>/list'}"
                   noDataText="No Chat history..">    
  <items>
    <FeedListItem text="{chatbot>text}" 
                  icon="{= ${chatbot>type} === 'query' ?                                        
                  'sap-icon://customer' : 'sap-icon://da-2' }">
    </FeedListItem>                        
  </items>
</List>

 

 

Some UI Finally.

Initially, display only Illustration and hide other content of the sidePanel.

on click of "lets go" button, hide the Illustration and display both the ScollContainer and Input conrols.

 

Create and set an empty JSON Model to the view. Add below code in the onInit method.

 

that.jsonModel = new JSONModel();
this.getView().setModel(that.jsonModel, "chatbot");

 

Same Model is bound to the items property of the List control in the View.

 

Since there is no value in JSON Model initially, List Control would display "No Chat History.." as it is set in NoData property of the List.

When you type something in the Input box, it calls external API and gets response from the assistant.

Add below code in your controller file to make an API Call.

 

onSubmitQuery: function (oEvent) {
        var oInput = oEvent.getSource();
        var sQuery = oInput.getValue();
        oInput.setValue("");

        // Add User query to the model
        that.aList = that.jsonModel.getProperty("/list");
        if (!that.aList) {
          that.aList = [];
        }

        var oJsonObj = {
          text: sQuery,
          type: "query",
        };
        that.aList.push(oJsonObj);
        that.oJsonModel.setProperty("/list", that.aList);

        // Add Bot Response to the model
        // fetch existing model
        that.aList = that.oJsonModel.getProperty("/list");
        var sUrl;

        sUrl = "<your-api-endpoint>/query";

        this.postAPI(sUrl, sQuery)
          .done(function (result) {
            var aList = Array.isArray(result) ? result : [result];
            that.oJsonModel.setProperty("/list", $.merge(that.aList, aList));
          })
          .fail(function (result) {
            var aList = [];
            var oJsonObj = {
              text: "Failed to connect to backend!",
              type: "response",
            };
            that.aList.push(oJsonObj);
            that.oJsonModel.setProperty("/list", that.aList);
          })
          .always(() => {
          });
      }

 

 Note : postAPI is just another custom function to make API call.

 

Final Result, This is how it would look like.

 

Conclusion : 

This is how you can add a chat assistant widget in a page of your existing UI5 application. 

 

What's next ?

There is still room for UI improvement.

Check below blog on How to display Query on right hand side and Response from the assistant on left hand side.

Next Blog : Dynamic Query Response Handling with Factory Function  

Upcoming Blogs : [ Adaptive Cards, Action Items and many more ... ]

Update : AI tools and Chatbot as copilot for develoepers

 

Stay tuned for more blogs on this series.

entry.title: Train-The-Trainer: SAP BTP Process Automation
entry.content:
Join us for our upcoming Train-The-Trainer: SAP BTP Process Automation (Afternoon Session)!

 

  • When? December 6th, 2024 - 09:00 - 13:00 GMT-3
  • Where? Online 
  • Language: English

 

Register now via Eventbrite: SAP BTP Process Automation Registration, Fri 6 Dec 2024 at 13:00 | Eventbrite

 

About this event: 

The goal of this half-day training is to explain the basic principles of the SAP Business Technology Platform (BTP) and to give first insights into the new BTP low-code/no-code curriculum. In addition to presentations and demos, participants will get the opportunity to experience SAP BTP services hands-on.

The final curriculum uses the well-known model company Global Bike and consists of slides, a series of simple exercises and a case study. In the exercises, learners are introduced to the basic functions of process automation with SAP Build Process Automation. They start by learning about applications and automations using a simple Hello World example. In the case study, learners go through a complex project that shows them how Global Bike plans the scheduled availability of rental bikes at the New York City and Munich locations based on the weather forecast for the coming days. To do this, the automation to be developed reads temperatures, dates and locations from the Google weather app and processes them further. Students learn how automations, once created, can repeatedly and error-free obtain and process such data and how they support decision-making. 

Participation is online and free of charge. 

 

Note: This training has been sponsored by SAP UA or third parties. The in4MD Service GmbH, a long-term spin-off of the UCC Magdeburg, organizes and conducts the event. It draws on UCC colleagues from Magdeburg and Munich or subject matter experts from the academic community to conduct the event. The event is only for lecturers and with a maximum of 5 participants per institution.

 

We can't wait to see you there!

 

More information: SAP BTP Process Automation Registration, Fri 6 Dec 2024 at 13:00 | Eventbrite and LinkedIn Post

o codigo fica no 77 e os otros campos no grupo 87, veja tua categoria de NF a qual controle de tela está amarrada e faça isso. Se voce fez direito as sapnotes é so fazer isso que aparece, deve estar oculto no teu customzing .

entry.title: Re: Linking Project WBS to Timesheets in the "Manage My T...
entry.content: Hello, what could be the issue even after assigning the resource, there is no task appearing in Mange My Timesheet app

entry.title: PO delivery address maintenance
entry.content:
1. In PO create/change mode, type in a new delivery address, and save PO

2. Go click on “Address” field, you can see a new address number created. This means every time user types in an address, system creates a new address number. 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: PO delivery address maintenance
entry.content:
Hi,

The basic system behaviour is that, when you create a purchase order, and you fill in storage location and plant also, then after saving the address field will be filled out with the storage locations address number.
But if you fill out only plant, then address will not filled out with the plant's address number.

It is also standard behaviour, that if you create a new PO, then address will be filled in only after saving the document, but if you change an existing document (for example changing storage location), new address value will already displayed on delivery address tab.

You can also type manually an existing address number into ADRN2 field. The manual activity will always overwrite the automatically determined address numbers.

Please refer to the KBA https://me.sap.com/notes/3033351

Also, in app Maintain business partner you may create business partner, customer, and supplier and provide the necessary details of the business partner like address, payment transactions, tax data and so on.

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/f86dc2eb1f8b48c880a7607213104b27/beccd7570afba073e10000000a441470.html

Thank you,

SAP Support

entry.title: Re: SAP GUI ALV width on 2K, 4K monitors
entry.content: I was able to edit my original post and upload image. Please look at it. And this is screenshot from Full HD resolution. On bigger resolutions not used space is bigger.

entry.title: Re: how to create a pdf document from abap report
entry.content: @mark_fryu For your information, here is the PDF from an ABAP program which does only WRITE to a spool request and calls CONVERT_ABAPSPOOLJOB_2_PDF to generate the PDF ("very sober" presentation, frames, monospaced font; there could also be some colors):

entry.title: Controlling Fiori EAM Access to technical objects by their category
entry.content:
Hi SAP Community,

We're seeking assistance with restricting user access within the EAMS_WDA_TECHOBJ_OIF FIORI Webdynpro Apps (both "Create technical object" and "Edit technical object"). We need to implement granular control over which types of equipment and functional locations a specific user can create and modify.

Specifically, the user should only be permitted to:

  • Create: Only Equipment of type 'X' using the "Create technical object" app. Creation of other equipment types (e.g., 'Y') and functional locations should be prohibited.

  • Modify: Only Equipment of type 'X' using the "Edit technical object" app. Modification of other equipment types should be prohibited. Furthermore, only functional locations of type 'Z'  should be modifiable. Modifications to other functional location types should be prevented.

We need to understand the best approach to achieve this restriction within the SAP system. Are there specific authorization objects, roles, or configuration settings that would allow us to enforce these precise limitations? If the SAP standard would provide a solution, would there be any suitable BADI or User Exit?Any guidance or best practices on implementing this access control would be greatly appreciated.

Thank you for your assistance.

entry.title: Essential transfer parameters are missing in record: 000001
entry.content:
Hello guys

I´m receiving this error message in ME2O when i trying to create a delivery for subcontracting. Message VL561.

Obs: I already did succesfull deliveries using the same plant, so, i think is something with the vendor master. (Is the first movimentation with this vendor)

Already checked and, the customer view is created for the BP.

Someone already had the same situation and know how to handle ?

Thank you!!!

entry.title: SAP CodeJam HANA ML in Wrocław 2024-10 Recap
entry.content:
At the end of October, we had the Getting Started with Machine Learning using SAP HANA and Python in Wrocław, Poland, kindly hosted by LeverX and organized by @Olena_Nadtochii. 

We had a fantastic group of participants, ranging from seasoned SAP veterans...

...to fresh talents who recently graduated from university.

This SAP CodeJam took place in a historical building—the former seat of the Faculty of Pharmacy of Wrocław University: a part of the university buildings' frontage, stretching along the Odra River in the northern part of the Old Town. The view from the top was breathtaking: from the Gothic Cathedral on the right to Concordia Design on the left—the Building of the Year 2021, according to ArchDaily.

And the food was equally fabulous.

I’d like to thank all the participants who joined me for this final SAP CodeJam of 2024!

The 2024 tour included 14 stops for me, and now it has come to an end.

Now, the next stops are in 2025, and I hope to see you in Spain ( @ajmaradiaga ), UAE ( @athavanraja ), India ( @ShilpaSAP ). Would you like to host such an SAP CodeJam in your location? Here are the details: https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/quot-getting-started-with-machine-learning-usin...

entry.title: Re: Cannot install Booster - SAP Integration Suite application is not subscribed.
entry.content:
Dear @Hira 
I have done all these steps described, everything is active and still the Booster is not working, so to summarize:
✅Created Integration Suite as Service (subscription is active)

✅Assigned role collection:  Integration_Provisioner

✅Activated all capabilities

✅Checked if capabilities are active

❌Assigning Booster does not work

I created a support to SAP, however no response yet..

entry.title: Re: Job in SM37 keeps getting restored to the defaults
entry.content: It could be a job in client 000. There is the AUTOABAP job (program SAPMSSY6) which does lots of things (see the note 16201).

entry.title: Internal table names for data of direct transfer inside migration cockpit
entry.content:
Hi,

I'm looking for the internal table names where the data - read from the source system - is stored in S/4 for simulation and migration . Up to now I've only found the table names for the instances (starting with /1LT/PE*), but they only contain the key fields and not the data fields of the source tables, e.g. MARA, MARC, MBEW for object 'Product'.

entry.title: Re: Learn how to get an S-user ID
entry.content: Thank you, Monika. The blog is very useful and informative.

entry.title: Re: Customer exit SUSR0001 to log off invalid user
entry.content: I don't know why there's a different behavior between your system and mine, as the TH_POPUP popup remains displayed after logoff, till the user presses the button OK. A possible solution is to make your ABAP code call a non-ABAP program on the user's laptop to display the popup (script, .exe, .ocx or whatever). The popup must not be part of SAP GUI of course, as you could experience.

entry.title: Steps to Enable Concur Integration
entry.content:
Could you please guide us on the initial steps to enable the Concur solution and begin testing?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Steps to Enable Concur Integration
entry.content:
Please refer to the below Document: 

SAP Business ByDesign and Concur Integration Guide

entry.title: Re: Sales Orders - Product allocation failure report
entry.content:
Hi Juwin

 

I've come across a similar requirment from client. Were you able to achieve this. Any insights regarding this matter would be helpful

entry.title: Health Monitoring with Cloud ALM - Custom Metrics for S/4 HANA private cloud Part 1 (Postman)
entry.content:
Introduction

More than one year ago I asked SAP about the possibility to include custom metrics for Cloud ALM Health Monitoring in S/4 on-prem. It would be easily solved by adding a BADI during the Health Monitoring metrics collector, I even tested it with the debugger and it worked nicely.

The proper solution is available in S/4 HANA Public Cloud with the Schedule Metric Provider Collection Fiori App but unfortunately it hasn't been made available to the Private Cloud edition, even in S/4 2023... This limitations are all explained in this blog from @TuncayKaraca .

Alternatively I also created custom "Use Case" for the /sdf/alm_setup transaction implementing the interface /sdf/if_calm_task. This also works but it could be broken any moment when upgrading the ST-PI component since it's not "Clean Core".

The good news is that Cloud ALM offers a Raw Data Inbound Metrics API and it allows us to send our own custom metrics for an existing system/service. And not only from ABAP but from any REST client. There are some blogs describing this API but none of them really explains how to use it in detail so I decided to create this blog to go a bit deeper into the subject.

Create a BTP CALM API instance with Raw Data Inbound Metrics scopes

To allow a consumer to use the Inbound Metrics API, an instance for the Cloud ALM API service needs to be created with the required scopes. See the documentation: https://help.sap.com/docs/cloud-alm/apis/raw-data-inbound-metrics-api#authorizations

*Note: To my experience the instance name shouldn't have special characters or spaces. Use of dashes and underscore symbols could cause undetectable issues.

  • Instance creation:

  • Parameters (scopes):

 

{
    "xs-security": {
        "xsappname": "<your-instance-name>",
        "authorities": [
            "$XSMASTERAPPNAME.calm-api.hm.write",
            "$XSMASTERAPPNAME.calm-api.metrics.write"
        ]
    }
}

 

  • Create a service key for the client authentication:

 

 

Inbound Metrics API Usage

For complete and updated information, check the official SAP documentation: Raw Data Inbound Metrics API | SAP Help Portal. It contains all the supported metrics types, parameters, restrictions and an example request body. The SAP Business Accelerator Hub page for SAP Cloud ALM Raw Metrics contains the API Reference, the schemas and also the possibility to test with the Cloud ALM Demo tenant of SAP.

As per 02-11-24, the inbound metrics API only supports gauge, sum and histogram metrics for the Health Monitoring use case, future versions might extend the functionality.

The most important thing to know is that the request body to send the metrics follows the OpenTelemetry standard, check the "opentelemetry-proto" GitHub repository to understand the metrics schema and find some useful examples.

 

Test the API in Postman

This SAP GitHub repository contains examples on how to use Cloud ALM APIs from Postman and other tools. The repository is not being updated frequently so if the API versions have changed, there might be missing examples.

The following steps describe how to use Postman to post a custom gauge metric for an existing Claud ALM system ID.

  • Create a new Postman Collection "Cloud ALM Inbound Metrics API" and Declare the necessary variables for to authenticate to the API service and post a metric. Use the service key generated for the API instance to determine the token URL, client ID, client secret and root URL. The token and timestamp will be filled later via pre-request script.

 

  • Prepare a pre-request script to authenticate before any request in order to fetch the bearer token and also set the timestamp variable.

 

let tokenUrl = pm.collectionVariables.get('CALM_TOKEN_URL');
let clientId = pm.collectionVariables.get('CALM_CLIENT_ID');
let clientSecret = pm.collectionVariables.get('CALM_CLIENT_SECRET');
let calmRootUrl = pm.collectionVariables.get('CALM_ROOT_URL');
 
let getTokenRequest = {
    method: 'POST',
    url: tokenUrl,
    header: {
        'Content-Type': 'application/x-www-form-urlencoded',
    },
    body: {
        mode: 'urlencoded',
        urlencoded: [
            { key: 'grant_type', value: 'client_credentials' },
            { key: 'scope', value: '' },
            { key: 'client_id', value: clientId },
            { key: 'client_secret', value: clientSecret }
        ]
    }
};
 
if ((typeof tokenUrl === 'undefined') || (tokenUrl === null) || (tokenUrl === '')) {
    console.log("No tokenUrl");
    return;
};
if ((typeof clientId === 'undefined') || (clientId === null) || (clientId === '')) {
    console.log("No clientId");
    return;
};
if ((typeof clientSecret === 'undefined') || (clientSecret === null) || (clientSecret === '')) {
    console.log("clientSecret");
    return;
};
 
pm.sendRequest(getTokenRequest, (err, response) => {
    let jsonResponse = response.json(),
        newAccessToken = jsonResponse.access_token;
 
    console.log({ err, jsonResponse, newAccessToken })
 
    pm.collectionVariables.set('CALM_TOKEN', newAccessToken);
});
 
const timeMillis = Date.now();
const timeUnixNano = timeMillis * 1000000;
pm.collectionVariables.set('CURRENT_TIMESTAMP_NANO', timeUnixNano);

 

  • Inside the collection, create a POST request to the collection with the name "Test Custom Metric" and fill in the mandatory parameters: useCase, version and serviceId. Obtain the service ID from the Landscape Management app (for an S/4 system I had to use the LMS Id) and set dev parameter to true if you want to receive the API response.

 

 

  • Add the "Authorization"  header with the Bearer token

  • Fill in the request body to send the custom metric. In this example, a custom metric for SM13 errors will be sent for a specific instance of the client 300 in system S4D. The "dataPoints" array could easily have more records appended to send metrics for other instances or clients:

 

{
    "resourceMetrics": [
        {
            "resource": {
                "attributes": [
                    {
                        "key": "service.name",
                        "value": {
                            "stringValue": "S4D300"
                        }
                    }
                ]
            },
            "scopeMetrics": [
                {
                    "scope": {
                        "name": "HM_ANALYTICS_DP",
                        "version": "V1"
                    },
                    "metrics": [
                        {
                            "name": "Custom.SM13.Errors",
                            "description": "SM13 Update Requests with Errors",
                            "gauge": {
                                "dataPoints": [
                                    {
                                        "timeUnixNano": "{{CURRENT_TIMESTAMP_NANO}}",
                                        "asDouble": 5.0,
                                        "attributes": [
                                            {
                                                "key": "Client",
                                                "value": {
                                                    "stringValue": "300"
                                                }
                                            },
                                            {
                                                "key": "Instance",
                                                "value": {
                                                    "stringValue": "s4d-pas_00"
                                                }
                                            },
                                            {
                                                "key": "Sid",
                                                "value": {
                                                    "stringValue": "S4D"
                                                }
                                            }
                                        ]
                                    }
                                ]
                            }
                        }
                    ]
                }
            ]
        }
    ]
}

 

  • Send the POST request and check if there is an error response. If the body is valid, the BTP Instance has the right scopes and the service key authentication is correctly setup, the metric will appear in the Health Monitoring App for the given service ID. After the metric is populated in CALM, it's possible to define thresholds in CALM to trigger events and show the "Warning" and "Error" ratings.

The same result can be achieved from S/4 HANA. In a part 2 I will explain how to retrieve the authentication token and build the body and call the API with ABAP.

entry.title: Re: NF-e Nota Técnica 2019.001 v1.62 novos campos adicionados à nota fiscal

@Eduardolarrion obrigado pela resposta, verifiquei aqui e já estava correto estas configurações no meu ambiente, tanto na tabela J_1BAKITV quanto na tabela J_1BAKIT_MANV, alguma outra sugestão?

EDIT: o campo do grupo 77 está correto tanto nas configurações nas tabelas quanto na exibição nas transações.

entry.title: Re: Job in SM37 keeps getting restored to the defaults
entry.content:
Hi, I checked client 000 with the DDIC user and there is no such job named 'AUTOABAP' or any job with the report 'SAPMSSY6' in our system. Neither on the 000 client nor on the 100 client.

This was ment to be a reply instead of an answer -_- Ignore this.

entry.title: Re: Job in SM37 keeps getting restored to the defaults
entry.content: Hi, I checked client 000 with the DDIC user and there is no such job named 'AUTOABAP' or any job with the report 'SAPMSSY6' in our system. Neither on the 000 client nor on the 100 client.

entry.title: Re: Interest in the Digital Skills Initiative
entry.content:
Hi, @David_Chaviano 
Hope you are doing well.

I first came across SAP during my bachelor's degree. As I learned about ERP systems, SAP stood out due to its extensive capabilities and impact across various industries. This exposure sparked my interest in exploring how large-scale systems operate and integrate complex business processes. The initial experience motivated me to dive deeper, eventually shaping my decision to specialize in SAP and pursue a career in SAP ABAP & Fiori consulting. Over time, I’ve enjoyed the challenge of working with SAP solutions, from custom development to full implementations and contributing to efficient, reliable systems for my clients

entry.title: Re: Role contract partner in IS-U not same as role from F...
entry.content:
Hi Ahemad,
please check the recommendation in the note  2438379 if you use an S/4HANA system for which the CVI integration for Utilities has been set up.
Best regards,
Gabriele

entry.title: Re: Creation of P-User
entry.content:
The correct URL is https://accounts.sap.com/ui/public/showRegisterForm?spName=profile.people.sap.com&Url=&sourceUrl= 
(with & before Url)

entry.title: Re: WSDL must not contain WSRM policies S/4HANA Public CL...
entry.content: Important Remark: No WSRM policies allowed! The SOAP 1.x adapter does not support WSRM. Make sure the used WSDL does not contain such policies or use the adapter without WSDL. With the update on 6th of January a check is introduced raising an error in case WSRM is defined in the WSDL.

entry.title: When using the MASS BP copy transaction FD15 the first names went missing
entry.content:
Good day 

 

When doing the mass transaction FK15 and FD15, the first name on the BP number (table BUT000, FIELD NAME_FIRST) went missing. I tried several OSS notes (3033442, 2962810) but it has been implemented already. Anyone with the same issue and how to resolve it, please?

Thanks

entry.title: Re: NF-e Nota Técnica 2019.001 v1.62 novos campos adicionados à nota fiscal
entry.content:
Mano acho melhor tu chamar um SD pra te ajudar, pois não é esse controle, é no SPRO > COMPONENTES VALIDOS PARA VARIAS APLICAÇOES >FUNÇAO GERAL DA APLICAÇÃO > NOTA FISCAL  >ADMINISTRAÇÃO DE DOCUMENTOS,

La voce tem que ver qual é a categoria de NF e identificar o controle de tela e ver se não está oculto. Caso esteja colocar opcional

Eduardo

entry.title: Re: i18n_de.properties in UI5 Application
entry.content:
Hi

Did you try to to add `de` in supportedLocales. For instance

"models": {
"i18n": {
"type": "sap.ui.model.resource.ResourceModel",
"settings": {
"bundleName": "sap.ui.demo.walkthrough.i18n.i18n",
"supportedLocales": [
"",
"de"
],
"fallbackLocale": ""
}
},
 
There should be also corresponding `i18n_de.properties` next to `i18n.properties`. Now you can add ?sap-ui-language=de to run your application using german.
This link https://sapui5.hana.ondemand.com/sdk/#/topic/91f217c46f4d1014b6dd926db0e91070 may also help.

entry.title: Re: How can we leverage SAP C/4HANA to improve customer e...
entry.content: Thank you very much, my group and I have searched a lot but could not find the answer we needed. If possible, during the learning period, if I have any questions, I will ask the community again.

entry.title: Trigger Macro issue in SAP IRPA
entry.content:
Hi,

I'm trying to trigger a macro in SAP IRPA using the "Trigger Macro" activity, but getting the below error:

"The macro InsertPivotTable has failed. The error message is : Cannot run the macro 'C:\\Automation Projects Execution\\Mosaic\\Weekly pivot details.xlsm!InsertPivotTable'. The macro may not be available in this workbook or all macros may be disabled. DispInvoke: Run Exception occurred.\r\n",
 
Any help is appreciated.
 
Thanks.

entry.title: Re: Devtoberfest 2024 Contest Official Rules
entry.content: @T1mey - We have performed the initial drawing, but there is a long and complicated validation process before we can notify anyone or announce the winners.

entry.title: Re: Authentication in BTP with Ariba
entry.content: Hi, Did you evaluate the SAP Business Network SSO for Supplier, is that fill your requirement?

entry.title: Re: Problem with Code Completion in Eclipse ATD
entry.content:
Hi Elias,

I noticed this today as well and at a guess, it came in with the latest Eclipse updated applied. It is indeed a nuisances as it for example looks like this for me when I want to write a simple data-statement and start to type "da" when it correctly suggests "TA" as the continuation ...

But upon accepting that, it doesn't properly turn the "da" into upper case as it did before and not so helpfully suggests the addion of "BEGIN OF" with the cursor positioned at the end:

For me, this isn't an improvement to earlier behaviour.

Cheers

Bärbel

entry.title: Attachment handling in CPI
entry.content:
Hello All,

Can someone suggest us how to handle attachment in CPI while posting the data into rest API(HTTP service).

Scenario: we used to receive the data from Amazon S3 bucket in the form of XML and in between there would be some logics so after completion of logics we have to post the data as an attachment. Can anyone suggest how to achive this requirement in CPI.

Thank you!

Do you want to do the calculation in ABAP accessing a locally stored Excel file or are you doing them in the report before exporting the data to excel? Kind regards

entry.title: Re: Intercompany Allocations, using the Universal Allocation
entry.content:
Dear Mr. Westman,

What if we have the need to post an assessment between a sender cost center "CC1" from company code "A" to receiving cost center "CC2" in company code "B".

But this assesment is purely for managmeent purposes. So, we don´t need, nor want to post intercompany invoices afterwards.

As this is a pure "management" allocation, we want this allocation to be reflected ONLY in a non-leading ledger.

How can this be done ?

Thanks a lot!

entry.title: TSL field in ACDOCU is not the same as in ACDOCA
entry.content:
Hello,

Please help me with following issue:

I have one document posted in FI module, with transaction currency (PLN) different from company code currency (RSD).
In ACDOCA, TSL, WSL, HSL fileds give proper value, but in ACDOCU TSL filed shows value in local currency instead of transaction currency. Please check pictures bellow.

Do you have any idea why this is happening? 
PS:
posted GL account doesn't have check box "balances in locl currncy only!" activated.

entry.title: Re: My customer is moving from ECC to RISE, MPLS issue
entry.content:
Hi Lojane,

To troubleshoot the two-month MPLS connectivity delay between your ISP and SAP's C4C network, it is essential to set up a joint troubleshooting call involving your on-premises network team, SAP's network team, and the colocation provider. This collaborative approach allows each party to trace logs and identify the root cause of the issue. For escalation, you can reach out to your CSP (Customer Success Partner), who can help manage the issue and support project progress. The RISE Technical Service Manager (TSM) is another key contact, as he/she can address technical issues and liaise with SAP's internal teams. Additionally, the RISE Client Delivery Manager (CDM) can assist in overcoming delivery-related obstacles, potentially helping expedite the process and coordinate the efforts. If you already have an open SAP support ticket, consider contacting the Customer Interaction Center (CIC) to escalate the issue further. The CIC team can help arrange the necessary troubleshooting call as described and oversee the ticket resolution process.

Hope this helps move your project forward!
@Amin_Omidy

entry.title: Re: SAP CAP Authentication
entry.content: The issue has been resolved. As i was not accessing the Service url.

entry.title: RMK Integration with External Career Site: Resolving Candidate Redirection Issues
entry.content:
Hi Team,

We are integrating RMK with an external 3rd party Career site vendor. So we post the job in RCM, it shows up in the client's Career site and when the candidate clicks apply he/she is directed to the RMK page to create an account and apply to the vacancy. RMK is only used for the application page, and will not be used as the main careers site/page of the client.

Question:

We have agencies recommending candidates that land in the forwarded status, however when we invite them to apply, the email token has the RMK job description link as well as the link to create an account/to generate the password. After they successfully generated the password and accepted the DPCS statement, they are redirected to the RMK search page.

How can we direct these candidates straight to the job application page instead or at least back to the career site page?

In projects where the client is using their own career page and not RMK, how is the invite to apply link solved?

entry.title: Re: Enhancement while listing in Retail
entry.content:
Hi Nedim,

If the BAdI is triggered for you only in MM41/42 and not in WSM3, then most probably you are not executing an "initial" listing. Namely, during executing the listing, the article maintenance part (incl. the mentioned BAdI) will be triggered only, if the corresponding article hasn't yet been listed before to the same site (also expired listing will prevent this). So, for one article/site combination only the very first listing will trigger this, no further executions anymore to save on performance a lot.

Best regards,
Andras

entry.title: Re: NF-e Nota Técnica 2019.001 v1.62 novos campos adicionados à nota fiscal
entry.content:
Verifiquei o caminho indicado e realmente o grupo de campos 87 não está cadastrado, já repassei para equipe funcional dar uma olhada.

Obrigado novamente pela ajuda

entry.title: Re: CR2020 viewer print output is incorrect when PrintMod...
entry.content:
Thanks for the report, I see the problem...

CutePDF is not capable of using your margins when using POC.

In your screen shot of my test app notice the margins are set to 1 inch.

POC is only capable of setting/using .51 inch margins so it's adjusting the top of the page margin.

When I set it to .51, save the report now I see:

The other issue is you are using a custom paper size.

Not sure if CutePDF is capable of using margins that small, you have them set to .394, POC is adjusting accordingly.

When saved and opening in test app note the change:

And you have some custom paper size defined which is not a default paper size listed in CutePDF.

Bottom line is POC is not capable of using your default margins.

P2P is, because it uses the values saved in the report.

Nothing CR .NET POC can do, it's just how it works.

.51 is the minimum Margin POC can use, that adjusted by CutePDF alters the layout.

So when using this report always use the P2P API to print. Note also you can't adjust P2P printer info, that too is the norm.

entry.title: List of field changes in Transactions when migrating from ECC to S4
entry.content: When migrating from ECC to S4, the screens for most transactions have remained the same but there are some where the fields have been moved around the screen for a different layout.  I like to know if anyone has a compiled list of field changes to some of these transactions.

entry.title: Re: Output Management in SAP S/4HANA
entry.content: Excellent overview

entry.title: LSMW with object 0070 and program RV14BTCI, XK15 and non numerical vendor
entry.content:
I am using LSMW with object 0070 and program RV14BTCI, with XK15.

I concatenate vendor, material, purchasing org, plant and inforecord type.

when using a numerical vendor, I add the leading zeroes but when the vendor is alphanumeric I need to add spaces.

the issue is that when I add the spaces after the vendor, the system does not recognize it and inserts data from the next field instead, affecting also the next fields

how can I concatenate spaces or an alphanumeric vendor into VAKEY?

entry.title: Enhancement QEVA0008: Translation for button/function key 'reverse usage decision' (+FC1)
entry.content:
Dear all,

within transaction QA12 (change usage decision) we use SAP enhancement QEVA0008 (Usage decision: Customer function key (e.g. to cancel UD)) to perform custom defined functions - function key (+FC1). 

There is an english translation missing. Within SAP Knowledge Base Article 2630846 - Translation for button 'reverse usage decision' is incorrect (+FC1) the following is mentioned as resolution:

As described in the documentation of QEVA0008: "...You can freely define the description and function associated with this function key (+FC1)...." The standard text of the key can be switched with a custom description in the affected language to make it clear what the button does.

I searched within transaction SMOD for Enhancement QEVA0008, SE80 function module EXIT_SAPMQEVA_008 (Module for Editing Customer Function Code) and program SAPMQEVA
I'm no developer and can't find the right place/settings where a can maintain the translation.

Why can I find the settings to maintain the transalation for the customer functions?

Thanks in advance,
Alexandra

entry.title: Re: Migrating from Application Logging Service to Cloud Logging
entry.content:
@TS12's comment is about Prerequisites for IAS integration: https://help.sap.com/docs/cloud-logging/cloud-logging/prerequisites?version=Cloud#integrate-sap-cloud-identity-services---identity-authentication-saml-2.0-with-sap%0Acloud-logging  
However, it is hard to support not knowing the source of the error message. Usually, errors are related to signature_private_key not being base64 encoded and PKCS8 format. If you cannot find the error soon, feel free to create a bug ticket with BC-CP-CLS component.

entry.title: Re: Query Hierachy Input Parameter (F4) selection, User customized
entry.content:
Hi

the topic regarding auth on F4 seems to be an eternal return of the same for every BW project

regarding rsr-variable-f4-restrict-badi you can check this detailed how to: 

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-members/rsr-variable-f4-restrict-badi-with-compounding-object-restrictions/ba-p/13131189 

the main criticality in that scenario is to maintain a DSO  ( usually loaded by CSv) with the Country, Region, Company,  authorizations for each user. These data will be retreived by the badi methods and displayed in the F4

Hope it helps

Andreas

entry.title: Re: SAP Datasphere - How to flip sign the Measure value by GL Account type like SAP Analytics Cloud
entry.content:
Hi James,

I found your post really interesting, and I want to thank you for that. I tried to replicate your idea but I didn’t quite understand how you managed the "Operating Earnings" node. Let me explain further: in my model (I used a hierarchy with directories imported from the Fiori tile "Global Hierarchy"), the "Operating Earnings" line represents a hierarchical node, not an account. The result is that instead of getting 30,000.00 as in your example, I end up with 70,000.00.

Could you please explain how you created the hierarchy, specifically the technical details of this node?

I’d greatly appreciate any insights you can share with me.

Thanks

entry.title: Re: Job in SM37 keeps getting restored to the defaults
entry.content:
I guess it's not a job, but it runs

ST03N

entry.title: Digital Skill initiative invite
entry.content:
Hi@David_Chaviano,

I am Sonal Nikam ,living in Bremen Germany.

I have 6 yrs of experienced in Sap Abap. However ,i took break for 5 Years for family.

Now I Restart my Career and started developing my Skill in Sap Field with SAP Learning journey Hub to gain Certification. This Digital skill initiative help me to upskill and build a strong career to get job.

Thank you 

sonal Nikam

entry.title: Re: LSMW with object 0070 and program RV14BTCI, XK15 and non numerical vendor
entry.content: In ABAP, trailing spaces are always ignored with the C type. They are considered only if you define them with the STRING type (by using backquotes instead of single quotes).

entry.title: Re: Crystal reports 2020 export to odbc
entry.content:
I can confirm it crashed for me also, I used MS Access as the destination though.

Curious what did Support say about the issue? Other than the OS is not supported?

Looking at the Event Viewer I get this:

Faulting application name: crw64.exe, version: 14.3.4.5055, time stamp: 0x66d752f5
Faulting module name: u2fodbc.dll, version: 14.3.4.5099, time stamp: 0x6711420e
Exception code: 0xc0000005
Fault offset: 0x00000000000177e3
Faulting process id: 0xD0E8
Faulting application start time: 0x1DB2F8836D21C57
Faulting application path: C:\Program Files (x86)\SAP BusinessObjects\SAP BusinessObjects Enterprise XI 4.0\win64_x64\crw64.exe
Faulting module path: C:\Program Files (x86)\SAP BusinessObjects\SAP BusinessObjects Enterprise XI 4.0\win64_x64\u2fodbc.dll
Report Id: 2d1e134f-c5d4-4b3d-bf8f-fac42aafdfc1
Faulting package full name:
Faulting package-relative application ID:

Followed by this:

Application: crw64.exe
Framework Version: v4.0.30319
Description: The process was terminated due to an unhandled exception.
Exception Info: exception code c0000005, exception address 00007FF9558677E3
Stack:

I'll ping R&D and see what they say about it.

entry.title: Re: Job in SM37 keeps getting restored to the defaults
entry.content: Apparently AUTOABAP is a background task https://help.sap.com/doc/saphelp_nw75/7.5.5/en-US/48/51041d794672d1e10000000a42189c/content.htm

entry.title: Re: Query Hierachy Input Parameter (F4) selection, User customized

sorry wrong link . Right link below

regards

entry.title: Re: TSL field in ACDOCU is not the same as in ACDOCA
entry.content: Hi, @JAnnapureddy maybe you are familiar with this issue?

entry.title: Re: LSMW with object 0070 and program RV14BTCI, XK15 and...
entry.content:
hallo Sandra

thank you for the reply.

generally speaking I am aware of the fact that trailing spaces are ignored in ABAP and I can see that also in table LFA1 in the unconverted value of the vendor.

But it seems that in VAKEY they are: in fact I tried to add the spaces before the vendor and the system saw it, the fields were correct in their right spaces: the issue was that the system did not recognize the vendor because it considered the spaces

entry.title: Re: SAP Document and Reporting Compliance: Cloud or On-Premise? Not an “either or” option, but a str
entry.content:
A question about the subaccount required for SAP DRC, Cloud Edition, only available in the Frankfurt landscape: if the customer does not have a subaccount in this environment, can a new sub-account be deployed in Frankfurt to deploy SAP DRC, Cloud Edition without additional cost for this new tenant?
And regarding the different environments, such as DEV, QAS and PRD, can 3 tenants also be deployed in Frankfurt for SAP DRC, Cloud Edition?

entry.title: cl_abap_conv_in_ce Class is not permitted in the behavior defination
entry.content:
Hi Everyone ,

I am following this SAP blog - https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-members/upload-excel-using-sap-rap-only/bc-p/13928217#M170140

and facing an issue with cl_abap_conv_in_ce Class is not permitted in the behavior defination

If anyone have any suggection , Please help me on the same.

Thanks

Dinesh Kumar

entry.title: Re: Crystal reports 2020 export to odbc
entry.content: Am I replying to you, Don? This post arrangement is a little wonky. Anyway, I'm still working with Support on this. The last time I looked, Windows 11 IS supported; can you point me to a document that says otherwise? I know how that sounds, I'll try to find one that says Win11 is supported. Otherwise we're seeing the same entry in the Event Viewer, so I don't know what else to say.

entry.content:
HI 

I am getting the same error even with runtimeURL with US10. 

system connecting to:

entry.title: Re: SAP Document and Reporting Compliance: Cloud or On-Premise? Not an “either or” option, but a str
entry.content: @ONavas You can follow instructions here and you won't face additional costs: https://help.sap.com/docs/cloud-edition/sap-document-and-reporting-compliance-cloud-edition/initial-setup?locale=en-US

entry.title: Re: SAP Datasphere - How to flip sign the Measure value by GL Account type like SAP Analytics Cloud
entry.content:
@CinziaL 

Here are a couple of screenshots of Account Dimension. 

As you can see it, it has only 4 attributes for making it simple.

'Hier' attribute has the information of the parent node.

I hope it helps you.
